Step 2: Make Prediction (Compilation Error)

Since the test only uses `spawnSync` (already imported) and standard Vitest functions, there should be no compilation errors. The CLI currently doesn't validate negative damage amounts, so it will likely produce a result instead of exiting non-zero. Let me predict:

Looking at the CLI code: the `claim` function will be called with negative damage. The CLI will likely succeed with status 0 and output "results" containing a payout calculation. So no compilation error - this will be a runtime/assertion error directly.

Let me check by running the test first.

Step 3: Run Test

content.text:
The test fails directly at runtime — no compilation error since all imports/functions exist. The CLI exits with status 0 (success) when it should not.
